name: Red Roasted Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine vinegar, paprika, garlic, 1/2 tsp salt and 1/2 tsp pepper. Mix well.
2. Rub the mixture over the chicken all over.
3. Tuck the wings into the back of the chicken and tie the legs together with kitchen string.
4. Cover the chicken with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 1 hour.
5. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
6. Heat oil in a medium skillet over high heat. Add onion, remaining 1/2 tsp salt, and remaining 1/2 tsp pepper. Sauté until onions are tender, about 8 minutes.
7. Stir in tomatoes and water; cook for 3 minutes.
8. Spoon the vegetable mixture into a nonaluminum baking dish (13x9x3-inch).
9. Place the chicken on top of the vegetables.
10. Roast in the preheated oven for 1 hour, or until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thigh meat registers 180°F (82°C) without touching bone.
11. Remove the chicken and vegetables with a slotted spoon to a serving platter.
12. Sprinkle chopped parsley over the dish before serving.
